info.title: SurveyMonkey API
info.description: SurveyMonkey REST API v3 provides programmatic access to SurveyMonkey resources including surveys, collectors, responses, contacts, and more.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of surveys owned or shared with the authenticated user.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Field to sort by (title, date_modified, num_responses)

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated additional fields to include (response_count, date_created, date_modified, language, question_count, analyze_url, preview, collect_stats)

parameters.name: start_modified_at
parameters.description: Filter surveys modified after this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: end_modified_at
parameters.description: Filter surveys modified before this date (ISO 8601)

post.description: Creates a new survey. You can create a blank survey or from an existing survey/template.

get.description: Returns a survey's details including the survey design.

patch.description: Modifies a survey's title, nickname, or other properties.

delete.description: Deletes a survey and all associated data.

get.description: Returns an expanded survey resource with all pages and questions included.
Returns a list of pages for a survey.

post.description: Creates a new page in a survey.

get.description: Returns a page for a survey.

patch.description: Modifies a page in a survey.

delete.description: Deletes a page from a survey.

get.description: Returns a list of questions on a survey page.

post.description: Creates a new question on a survey page.

get.description: Returns a question from a survey page.

patch.description: Modifies a question on a survey page.

delete.description: Deletes a question from a survey page.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of collectors for a survey.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Additional fields to include (type, status, response_count, date_created, date_modified, url)

post.description: Creates a new collector for a survey.

get.description: Returns a collector.
Returns a list of messages for an email collector.

post.description: Creates a message for an email collector.

get.description: Returns a message for a collector.

patch.description: Modifies a message for a collector.

delete.description: Deletes a message from a collector.

post.description: Sends or schedules a message for an email collector.

scheduled_date.description: Date to schedule the message. If not provided, sends immediately.

get.description: Returns a list of recipients for a collector message.

post.description: Adds recipients to a collector message.

get.description: Returns a list of responses for a collector.
Returns full expanded responses for a collector including answer data.
Returns a paginated list of responses for a survey.
Returns full expanded responses for a survey including answer data.

parameters.name: simple
parameters.description: If true, returns simplified response format

get.description: Returns a single response for a survey.

patch.description: Updates metadata for a survey response.

get.description: Returns an expanded response including all answer details.
Returns a paginated list of contact lists.
Returns a contact list.

get.summary: List contacts in a contact list
get.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts in a contact list.

post.summary: Create a contact in a list
post.description: Creates a new contact in a contact list.

get.description: Returns a contact from a contact list.

patch.description: Modifies a contact in a contact list.

delete.description: Deletes a contact from a contact list.

post.summary: Bulk add contacts to a list
post.description: Adds multiple contacts to a contact list in bulk.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all contacts.
Returns a single contact.
Returns a list of webhooks.
Returns a webhook.
Returns the current authenticated user's account details.
Returns a list of groups for the user's team.
Returns a group's details.
Returns a list of members in a group.
Returns a member of a group.
Returns a list of survey folders.
Returns a survey folder.
Returns available translations for a survey.
Returns a translation for a survey.

parameters.name: languageCode
parameters.description: The language code (e.g., es, fr, de)

put.description: Creates or updates a translation for a survey.

parameters.name: languageCode
parameters.description: The language code (e.g., es, fr, de)

get.description: Returns a list of available survey categories.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Language for category names (e.g., en, es)

get.description: Returns a list of available survey templates.
Returns a list of available benchmark bundles.
Returns a benchmark bundle's details.

parameters.name: bundleId
parameters.description: The ID of the benchmark bundle

get.description: Returns a list of questions from the question bank.
Returns rollup statistics for survey responses.
Returns response trends for a survey over time.
Returns a list of recipients for a collector.
Returns a recipient for a collector.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token. Obtain via SurveyMonkey OAuth 2.0 flow.

PageIdParam.name: pageId
PageIdParam.description: The ID of the survey page

MessageIdParam.name: messageId
MessageIdParam.description: The ID of the collector message

ContactListIdParam.name: contactListId
ContactListIdParam.description: The ID of the contact list

StartCreatedAtParam.name: start_created_at
StartCreatedAtParam.description: Filter responses created after this date (ISO 8601)

EndCreatedAtParam.name: end_created_at
EndCreatedAtParam.description: Filter responses created before this date (ISO 8601)

StartModifiedAtParam.name: start_modified_at
StartModifiedAtParam.description: Filter responses modified after this date (ISO 8601)

EndModifiedAtParam.name: end_modified_at
EndModifiedAtParam.description: Filter responses modified before this date (ISO 8601)

BadRequest.description: Bad request - invalid parameters or malformed request

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing access token

name.description: Error name (e.g., Bad Request, Authorization Error, Permission Error, Resource Not Found, Resource Conflict)

docs.description: URL to documentation for this error

from_survey_id.description: Copy an existing survey by ID

folder_id.description: Folder to place the survey in

subtype.description: Question subtype (e.g., vertical, horizontal, menu, multi, single, essay, ranking)

edit_response_type.description: When respondents can edit their response

contact_list_ids.description: Add all contacts from these contact list IDs

total_time.description: Total time spent on the survey in seconds

object_type.description: Type of object the webhook monitors

authorization.description: Authorization header value sent with webhook requests

tags.name: Surveys
tags.description: Create, list, get, update, and delete surveys
